name: Meridian
legalNameNote: Marketing name for the MeridianPSI NinjaTrader 8 add-on.
tagline: Complete risk management for NinjaTrader 8 — every limit, plus the behavioral layer none of them have
description: Meridian is the complete risk manager for NinjaTrader 8: every traditional limit a risk tool has — daily loss, max position size, P&L and drawdown caps, loss-streak cutoff — plus a real-time behavioral layer that tracks seven trading behaviors and computes a live PSI score on your machine.

systemRequirements.ninjaTrader: NinjaTrader 8 — we recommend the latest stable build from NinjaTrader
systemRequirements.note: Older NinjaTrader 8 builds may work but are not guaranteed. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported.
